free_text: Depletion of the 2f7/2 neutron hole state in 207Pb
Faculty of Engineering
Faculty of Integrated Arts and Sciences
School of Health Science
POL-BM: Value of beam polarization is not
given in the reference.
- Target enrichment is larger than 99%.
- Chemical-form of target is element.
- Physical-form of target is solid. Metalic foil
- Target-thickness is 0.800 mg/cm**2.
- Target is self supported.
Research Center for Nuclear Physics
Emitted deuterons were analyzed with the
spectrograph RAIDEN [H.Ikegami et al., Nucl.
Instrum. Methods 175, 33 (1980), M.Matoba et
al., Nucl. Instrum. Methods 180, 419 (1981).]
DWBA (Distorted wave Born approximation) (The
DWBA curves are calculated using the code DWUCK
[P.D.Kunz, code DWUCK, University of Colorado
(unpublished)] in zero-range approximation with
finite-range and nonlocal corrections.)
Absolute values of cross sections were determined with
the aid of an optical-model calculation of
elastic-scattering data with standard parameters
[J.J.H. Menet et al., Phys. Rev. C4(1971)1114].
Km + Am + On. Data converted from NRDF
